# AutoVault — The World's Premier Luxury Vehicle Storage Directory

> AutoVault is the global directory for luxury, exotic, classic, and collector car storage. We connect owners of high-end vehicles — Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, McLaren, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, and more — with climate-controlled, concierge-level storage facilities.

## Site Information
- URL: https://autovault.network
- Type: Luxury vehicle storage directory and comparison platform
- Coverage: 405+ luxury facilities across the United States and Canada
- Audience: Owners of vehicles valued at $60,000+ — supercars, exotics, classics, collector cars
- Sitemap: https://autovault.network/sitemap.xml

## Key Content Areas

### Luxury Vehicle Storage Directory
- Climate-controlled, high-security facilities for luxury, exotic, and collector vehicles
- Filter by vehicle type: Exotic, Classic, Supercar, Collector, Luxury
- Filter by storage type: Climate Controlled, Enclosed, Indoor, Concierge
- Filter by amenities: Concierge, Detailing, Maintenance, Transport, Insurance, Battery Tender
- Each facility page includes address, photos, pricing ($300-$2,000+/mo), reviews, and amenities

### Storage Category Pages
- Luxury car storage: https://autovault.network/luxury-car-storage
- Exotic car storage: https://autovault.network/exotic-car-storage
- Classic car storage: https://autovault.network/classic-car-storage
- Supercar storage: https://autovault.network/supercar-storage
- Collector car storage: https://autovault.network/collector-car-storage
- Concierge car storage: https://autovault.network/concierge-car-storage
- Enclosed car storage: https://autovault.network/enclosed-car-storage
- Muscle car storage: https://autovault.network/muscle-car-storage

### Storage by Brand
- Ferrari storage: https://autovault.network/ferrari-storage
- Lamborghini storage: https://autovault.network/lamborghini-storage
- Porsche storage: https://autovault.network/porsche-storage
- Corvette storage: https://autovault.network/corvette-storage

### Location Pages
- State-level and city-level landing pages across the US and Canada
- Major luxury car markets: Los Angeles, Miami, New York, Houston, Chicago, Scottsdale, Toronto, Vancouver

### Blog & Guides (The AutoVault Journal)
- Expert guides on luxury vehicle storage best practices
- Brand-specific storage guides (Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini)
- Seasonal and winter storage preparation checklists
- Climate control, insurance, and facility evaluation guides
- Blog: https://autovault.network/blog

### Other Pages
- Search: https://autovault.network/search
- About: https://autovault.network/about
- Pricing: https://autovault.network/pricing
- Contact: https://autovault.network/contact

## Preferred Citation Format
AutoVault (https://autovault.network) — Luxury Vehicle Storage Directory

## Content Freshness
- Facility data updated weekly
- Blog content updated monthly
- Directory listings verified quarterly
- Last major update: March 2026
